author: tutuge.zekunyan
message:
Add OC demos: Anchor, StackView, SelfSizing, AutoLayoutForm

Added 4 new Objective-C demo view controllers:
- TTGDemoAnchorLayoutViewController: Anchor constraint layout demo
- TTGDemoStackViewViewController: UIStackView integration demo
- TTGDemoSelfSizingViewController: intrinsicContentSize self-sizing demo
- TTGDemoAutoLayoutFormViewController: Auto Layout form with ScrollView + StackView

Updated Main.storyboard to include new demo entries and scenes.
Updated project.pbxproj to reference new files.

All demos build and test successfully.

author: tutuge.zekunyan
message:
Add Auto Layout, UIStackView, SwiftUI support and 4 layout demos

Core library improvements:
- Enhance intrinsicContentSize to compute height at a known width
  (mirroring UILabel.preferredMaxLayoutWidth behavior)
- Add systemLayoutSizeFitting override for two-pass Auto Layout
- preferredMaxLayoutWidth now invalidates intrinsicContentSize
- Add TagCloudView (UIViewRepresentable) for SwiftUI integration

New demo view controllers (Swift example):
- AnchorLayoutDemoViewController: pure anchor constraint layout
- StackViewDemoViewController: embedded in UIStackView with
  distribution, alignment, and isHidden auto-collapse
- SelfSizingDemoViewController: intrinsicContentSize auto-adjusts
  height as tags are added/removed
- SwiftUIDemoViewController: SwiftUI integration via TagCloudView

All 18 unit tests pass. Swift example builds successfully.

author: tutuge.zekunyan
message:
Optimize README for newcomers and add Chinese README

- Reorganize README with Quick Start (3-step guide) at the top
- Add Concepts section with visual architecture diagram
- Add Chinese README (README_CN.md) with cross-language links
- Move Source Structure and Migration Guide below usage sections
- Improve scannability with clearer section hierarchy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: tutuge.zekunyan
message:
Fix layout reentrancy, thread safety, layer management, and clean up project

- Remove duplicate layoutTagViews() call in layoutSubviews()
- Use setNeedsLayout/layoutIfNeeded in contentSize getter to avoid reentrancy
- Cache tag views internally to avoid repeated dataSource requests during
  hit-testing, gesture handling, and layout
- Add NSLock to protect lazy init of selectedContent/selectedStyle
- Add assertionFailure to TextTagContent base class copy(with:)
- Reuse CAShapeLayer instances for mask and border instead of recreating
- Remove shouldRasterize from shadow rendering to avoid redundant rasterization
- Add shallow-copy safety comment to AttributedStringContent
- Fix horizontal layout negative lineWidths when lines are empty
- Add TTGTagOCExample_Tests blueprint to Example scheme
- Translate Chinese test comments to English
- Switch Podfile git URLs from SSH to HTTPS
- Delete outdated .travis.yml (referenced Xcode 12.4)
- Remove legacy TTGTagCollectionView/ xcodeproj directory

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: tutuge.zekunyan
message:
feat: rewrite core source from Objective-C to Swift (v3.0.0)

- Migrate all 7 core classes (14 .h/.m files) under Sources/ to Swift,
  reorganized into Sources/TTGTags/{Model,Style,Layout,View/Internal}
- Extract pure layout calculator (TagCollectionLayout struct) from
  TTGTagCollectionView for full unit-test coverage
- Adopt aggressive Swift API style: remove TTG prefix, nested enums,
  computed properties, Int instead of NSUInteger, final class
- Preserve full Objective-C compatibility via @objc(TTGXxx) aliases;
  all original class names, selectors and enum cases remain unchanged
- Fix UIRectCorner bitmask bug in TextTagComponentView ([] + insert
  instead of (UIRectCorner)-1 bit-OR pattern)
- Make tagId auto-increment thread-safe with NSLock (TagIDProvider)
- Add SPM test target with 16 unit tests covering layout paths,
  TextTag copy/equals/selected rollback and Content.contentAttributedString
- Bump minimum deployment target from iOS 11 to iOS 16
- Bump version to 3.0.0; update Package.swift (swift-tools-version 5.9),
  podspec (source_files *.swift, no public_header_files), both Podfiles,
  and xcodeproj deployment targets
- Update ExampleSwift ViewController to new Swift-idiomatic API
- Fix OC Example delegate method signatures (NSUInteger → NSInteger)
  and replace deprecated UIActivityIndicatorViewStyleGray / topLayoutGuide
- Update README: new Swift usage examples, retain OC examples,
  add 3.0 migration guide section

Made-with: Cursor
